curation.synopsis: A tale of subterfuge in which good intentions clear the path to ruin. As the war for the Damocles Gulf grinds on, a cunning T'au Water Caste operative weaves a web of deceit around the Space Marines of the Jade Dragons, their Earth Caste counterparts, and a world's senior tech-priests alike. He plays Fire Warriors, Imperial servants and local tribes against one another like pieces on a board, never seeking open battle when a whisper or a planted relic will do. When a fragment of black leviathan hide finds its way into Adeptus Mechanicus hands, old loyalties curdle into bloodshed between servants of the Emperor. A political, low-trust story where the deadliest weapon is a well-placed lie.

flags.reason: Water Caste operative and Jade Dragons figures not named in available sources
